description.en: If you have at least one Beam Cannon in play, gain one less mana each round. Stuns enemies.
description.zh: 场上若存在至少一个此种防御塔，每回合少获得一点法力值。眩晕敌人。
description.en_plain: If you have at least one Beam Cannon in play, gain one less mana each round. Stuns enemies.
description.zh_plain: 场上若存在至少一个此种防御塔，每回合少获得一点法力值。眩晕敌人。

description.en:
The towers in range cannot be deactivated by any means.
Dispel.
description.zh: 范围内的防御塔不能以任何方式禁用。消耗。
description.en_plain:
The towers in range cannot be deactivated by any means.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 范围内的防御塔不能以任何方式禁用。消耗。

description.en:
When this tower levels up, it improves more than other towers.
Dispel.
description.zh: 当这个塔的等级提高时，它的属性提升比一般防御塔更多。消耗。
description.en_plain:
When this tower levels up, it improves more than other towers.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 当这个塔的等级提高时，它的属性提升比一般防御塔更多。消耗。

description.en: Can't be moved. Can be placed on empty tiles. Reduces enemy regeneration.
description.zh: 不能移动。可以放置在空位上。减少敌人的再生能力。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Can be placed on empty tiles. Reduces enemy regeneration.
description.zh_plain: 不能移动。可以放置在空位上。减少敌人的再生能力。

description.en: Draw one less card each round. Doesn't stack.
description.zh: 每回合少抽一张牌。不能叠加。
description.en_plain: Draw one less card each round. Doesn't stack.
description.zh_plain: 每回合少抽一张牌。不能叠加。

description.en: On play: Draw 1 card and lose 1 crystal. Can be played with 0 crystals.
description.zh: 当放置时，抽一张牌并失去1个水晶。没有水晶也可放置该塔。
description.en_plain: On play: Draw 1 card and lose 1 crystal. Can be played with 0 crystals.
description.zh_plain: 当放置时，抽一张牌并失去1个水晶。没有水晶也可放置该塔。

description.en: Disappears two rounds after being placed. The round counter resets when leveling up.
description.zh: 放置后两个回合就会消失。防御塔升级时回合计数器重置。
description.en_plain: Disappears two rounds after being placed. The round counter resets when leveling up.
description.zh_plain: 放置后两个回合就会消失。防御塔升级时回合计数器重置。

description.en: Very high rate of fire with low range and damage.
description.zh: 射速非常高，射程和伤害都很低。
description.en_plain: Very high rate of fire with low range and damage.
description.zh_plain: 射速非常高，射程和伤害都很低。

description.en: Gains attack speed as more spell mana is spent during the combat.
description.zh: 战斗中消耗的法术法力值越多，攻击速度越快。
description.en_plain: Gains attack speed as more spell mana is spent during the combat.
description.zh_plain: 战斗中消耗的法术法力值越多，攻击速度越快。

description.en: Every time you cast a spell, teleport back all enemies in range. The teleport strength increases with the tower level.
description.zh: 每次施法时，将范围内的所有敌人向出生点传送一段距离。传送距离随塔的等级增加。
description.en_plain: Every time you cast a spell, teleport back all enemies in range. The teleport strength increases with the tower level.
description.zh_plain: 每次施法时，将范围内的所有敌人向出生点传送一段距离。传送距离随塔的等级增加。

description.en: Fires arrows at a high rate of fire.
description.zh: 以高射速发射箭矢。
description.en_plain: Fires arrows at a high rate of fire.
description.zh_plain: 以高射速发射箭矢。

description.en: All towers in range get extra armor penetration.
description.zh: 范围内的所有防御塔获得额外的护甲穿透。
description.en_plain: All towers in range get extra armor penetration.
description.zh_plain: 范围内的所有防御塔获得额外的护甲穿透。

description.en: Fires arrows that pierce enemies.
description.zh: 发射具有贯通效果的箭矢。
description.en_plain: Fires arrows that pierce enemies.
description.zh_plain: 发射具有贯通效果的箭矢。

description.en: Weaker version of the Archer. Fires arrows at a high rate of fire.
description.zh: 射手的弱化版。以高射速发射箭矢。
description.en_plain: Weaker version of the Archer. Fires arrows at a high rate of fire.
description.zh_plain: 射手的弱化版。以高射速发射箭矢。

description.en: Weaker version of the Bomber. Fires bombs that deal damage in an area.
description.zh: 爆破手的弱化版。发射炸弹，造成范围伤害。
description.en_plain: Weaker version of the Bomber. Fires bombs that deal damage in an area.
description.zh_plain: 爆破手的弱化版。发射炸弹，造成范围伤害。

description.en: Can't be moved. Can't level up. Can only be placed on path tiles. Deals damage to all enemies in contact.
description.zh: 不能移动或提升等级。只能放置在路径方块中。造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Can't level up. Can only be placed on path tiles. Deals damage to all enemies in contact.
description.zh_plain: 不能移动或提升等级。只能放置在路径方块中。造成伤害。

description.en: Fires piercing electric pellets that stun and decay after a short distance. Can be moved out of Utility Plug-in tiles.
description.zh: 发射眩晕和腐化的穿刺弹丸。可移出实用牌。
description.en_plain: Fires piercing electric pellets that stun and decay after a short distance. Can be moved out of Utility Plug-in tiles.
description.zh_plain: 发射眩晕和腐化的穿刺弹丸。可移出实用牌。

description.en: Slowly burns enemies, slowing them and reducing their health regeneration.
description.zh: 缓慢焚毁敌人，降低其移动速度并减少其生命恢复。
description.en_plain: Slowly burns enemies, slowing them and reducing their health regeneration.
description.zh_plain: 缓慢焚毁敌人，降低其移动速度并减少其生命恢复。

description.en:
Removes 2/6/18 magic resist on impact.
Wave end: Convert 1/3/9 nearby Gray or Yellow tiles into Red tiles.
description.zh: 移除 2/6/18 魔法抗性。波形结束： 将附近 1/3/9 块灰色或黄色地砖转化为红色地砖。
description.en_plain:
Removes 2/6/18 magic resist on impact.
Wave end: Convert 1/3/9 nearby Gray or Yellow tiles into Red tiles.
description.zh_plain: 移除 2/6/18 魔法抗性。波形结束： 将附近 1/3/9 块灰色或黄色地砖转化为红色地砖。

description.en: Every time this tower shoots, lose 1 crystal. Can shoot when you have 0 crystals. Stuns.
description.zh: 每射出一发子弹就损失1个水晶。水晶为0时仍可以发射。眩晕。
description.en_plain: Every time this tower shoots, lose 1 crystal. Can shoot when you have 0 crystals. Stuns.
description.zh_plain: 每射出一发子弹就损失1个水晶。水晶为0时仍可以发射。眩晕。

description.en:
Can't level up. Rebound.
Round start: Transform nearby tiles into random tiles.
description.zh: 无法升级。反弹。回合开始： 将附近的瓷砖变成随机瓷砖。
description.en_plain:
Can't level up. Rebound.
Round start: Transform nearby tiles into random tiles.
description.zh_plain: 无法升级。反弹。回合开始： 将附近的瓷砖变成随机瓷砖。

description.en: Reduces enemy resistances with each shot.
description.zh: 每次射击都会降低敌人的抗性。
description.en_plain: Reduces enemy resistances with each shot.
description.zh_plain: 每次射击都会降低敌人的抗性。

description.en: Launches grenades that stun enemies.
description.zh: 发射可以击晕敌人的手榴弹。
description.en_plain: Launches grenades that stun enemies.
description.zh_plain: 发射可以击晕敌人的手榴弹。

description.en: Has double fire rate until wave 5.
description.zh: 双倍射速，直到第 5 波。
description.en_plain: Has double fire rate until wave 5.
description.zh_plain: 双倍射速，直到第 5 波。

description.en: On play: Level up this tower.
description.zh: 当放置时，此塔的等级上升。
description.en_plain: On play: Level up this tower.
description.zh_plain: 当放置时，此塔的等级上升。

description.en: Can't level up. Rebound. Emits a slowing laser that can be rotated manually.
description.zh: 无法提升等级。反弹。发射可手动旋转的减速激光。
description.en_plain: Can't level up. Rebound. Emits a slowing laser that can be rotated manually.
description.zh_plain: 无法提升等级。反弹。发射可手动旋转的减速激光。

description.en: Transcend: This card costs one less mana.
description.zh: 超越：这张牌花费的法力值减少一个。
description.en_plain: Transcend: This card costs one less mana.
description.zh_plain: 超越：这张牌花费的法力值减少一个。

description.en: Fires lasers that instantly destroy enemies below a certain percentage of health.
description.zh: 发射激光，能够斩杀生命值百分比较低的敌人。
description.en_plain: Fires lasers that instantly destroy enemies below a certain percentage of health.
description.zh_plain: 发射激光，能够斩杀生命值百分比较低的敌人。

description.en: Gains 0.5/1.5/5% fire rate for each Red and Crimson Eye tile in the map.
description.zh: 地图中每块红色和绯红之眼牌可获得 0.5/1.5/5% 的射速。
description.en_plain: Gains 0.5/1.5/5% fire rate for each Red and Crimson Eye tile in the map.
description.zh_plain: 地图中每块红色和绯红之眼牌可获得 0.5/1.5/5% 的射速。

description.en: Makes enemies more vulnerable to stuns, slows and teleports.
description.zh: 使敌人更容易受到眩晕、减速和传送的影响。(减少他们的韧性)
description.en_plain: Makes enemies more vulnerable to stuns, slows and teleports.
description.zh_plain: 使敌人更容易受到眩晕、减速和传送的影响。(减少他们的韧性)

description.en: Gets stronger the more spells are cast this combat (100 spells max).
description.zh: 在这场战斗中施放的法术越多就越强（最多100个法术）。
description.en_plain: Gets stronger the more spells are cast this combat (100 spells max).
description.zh_plain: 在这场战斗中施放的法术越多就越强（最多100个法术）。

description.en: Draw a card every 10 shots fired.
description.zh: 每发射10发子弹抽一张牌。
description.en_plain: Draw a card every 10 shots fired.
description.zh_plain: 每发射10发子弹抽一张牌。

description.en: Fires magical shots at a high rate of fire.
description.zh: 以高射速发射子弹造成法术伤害。
description.en_plain: Fires magical shots at a high rate of fire.
description.zh_plain: 以高射速发射子弹造成法术伤害。

description.en: All towers in range get extra magic penetration.
description.zh: 范围内的所有防御塔获得额外的法术穿透。
description.en_plain: All towers in range get extra magic penetration.
description.zh_plain: 范围内的所有防御塔获得额外的法术穿透。

description.en: Fires a mana laser each time you cast a spell. The damage scales with the spell cost. Pierces and slows.
description.zh: 在你每次施放法术时该塔发射一道魔法激光。伤害随该法术的费用增加。可穿透敌人并造成减速效果。
description.en_plain: Fires a mana laser each time you cast a spell. The damage scales with the spell cost. Pierces and slows.
description.zh_plain: 在你每次施放法术时该塔发射一道魔法激光。伤害随该法术的费用增加。可穿透敌人并造成减速效果。

description.en: Deals increasingly more damage when targeting the same enemy, up to triple damage over 5 seconds.
description.zh: 瞄准同一敌人时造成的伤害不断增加，持续5秒可达到最高三倍伤害。
description.en_plain: Deals increasingly more damage when targeting the same enemy, up to triple damage over 5 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 瞄准同一敌人时造成的伤害不断增加，持续5秒可达到最高三倍伤害。

description.en: Pierces and slows. When placed on a Moonstone tile, it stuns instead of slowing.
description.zh: 穿透并减速。放置在月光石牌上时，会眩晕而不是减速。
description.en_plain: Pierces and slows. When placed on a Moonstone tile, it stuns instead of slowing.
description.zh_plain: 穿透并减速。放置在月光石牌上时，会眩晕而不是减速。

description.en: Transforms into a random tower two rounds after being placed. Dispel.
description.zh: 放置两轮后会转化为一个随机的塔。消耗。
description.en_plain: Transforms into a random tower two rounds after being placed. Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 放置两轮后会转化为一个随机的塔。消耗。

description.en: Can't be deactivated. Can be rotated manually. Shoots 6 bullets that stun.
description.zh: 无法停用。可手动旋转。发射 6 颗眩晕子弹。
description.en_plain: Can't be deactivated. Can be rotated manually. Shoots 6 bullets that stun.
description.zh_plain: 无法停用。可手动旋转。发射 6 颗眩晕子弹。

description.en: Loses 10% fire rate for each alive enemy.
description.zh: 场上每存在一个敌人减少10%射速。
description.en_plain: Loses 10% fire rate for each alive enemy.
description.zh_plain: 场上每存在一个敌人减少10%射速。

description.en: On play: Lose 1 health. Silence all enemies in range while they are in range.
description.zh: 当放置时，失去1点生命值。在自身周围生成沉默效果光环。
description.en_plain: On play: Lose 1 health. Silence all enemies in range while they are in range.
description.zh_plain: 当放置时，失去1点生命值。在自身周围生成沉默效果光环。

description.en: Inflicts damage to all enemies on the battlefield at the same time.
description.zh: 同时对场上的所有敌人造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Inflicts damage to all enemies on the battlefield at the same time.
description.zh_plain: 同时对场上的所有敌人造成伤害。

description.en: Can't be deactivated.
description.zh: 不能被停用。
description.en_plain: Can't be deactivated.
description.zh_plain: 不能被停用。

description.en: Can't be moved. Can't level up. Can only be placed on path tiles. Slows all enemies in contact.
description.zh: 不能移动或提升等级。只能放置在路径方块中。减速。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Can't level up. Can only be placed on path tiles. Slows all enemies in contact.
description.zh_plain: 不能移动或提升等级。只能放置在路径方块中。减速。

description.en: Fires projectiles that slow enemies and reduce their healing.
description.zh: 发射弹丸，使敌人减速并减少生命恢复。
description.en_plain: Fires projectiles that slow enemies and reduce their healing.
description.zh_plain: 发射弹丸，使敌人减速并减少生命恢复。

description.en: If all towers in play have the same name as this tower, triple their fire rate.
description.zh: 如果游戏中的所有防御塔都与此塔相同，则其攻击速度提高三倍。
description.en_plain: If all towers in play have the same name as this tower, triple their fire rate.
description.zh_plain: 如果游戏中的所有防御塔都与此塔相同，则其攻击速度提高三倍。

description.en: Can target cloaked enemies. If it makes a critical hit, gain crystals.
description.zh: 可以攻击隐身的敌人。若打出暴击，则可以获得水晶。
description.en_plain: Can target cloaked enemies. If it makes a critical hit, gain crystals.
description.zh_plain: 可以攻击隐身的敌人。若打出暴击，则可以获得水晶。

description.en: Each shot has a high chance to deal a critical strike, scaling with luck.
description.zh: 每发子弹都具有高暴击率，运气值越高，暴击率能获得更高的增幅。
description.en_plain: Each shot has a high chance to deal a critical strike, scaling with luck.
description.zh_plain: 每发子弹都具有高暴击率，运气值越高，暴击率能获得更高的增幅。

description.en: Shoots stunning projectiles in all directions.
description.zh: 向四面八方射出具有眩晕效果的子弹。
description.en_plain: Shoots stunning projectiles in all directions.
description.zh_plain: 向四面八方射出具有眩晕效果的子弹。

description.en: Every time that this tower deals a critical strike, teleport back the enemy that was hit.
description.zh: 每次该塔造成暴击时，将被击中的敌人向出生点传送一段距离。
description.en_plain: Every time that this tower deals a critical strike, teleport back the enemy that was hit.
description.zh_plain: 每次该塔造成暴击时，将被击中的敌人向出生点传送一段距离。

description.en: Can't level up. When you sell this tower, you get all the mana you spent for it.
description.zh: 当你卖掉此塔时，你会得到你为其花费的所有法力值。此塔不能正常提升等级。
description.en_plain: Can't level up. When you sell this tower, you get all the mana you spent for it.
description.zh_plain: 当你卖掉此塔时，你会得到你为其花费的所有法力值。此塔不能正常提升等级。

description.en: Has damaging and slowing spheres that orbit in the shape of an atom symbol.
description.zh: 能造成伤害和减速效果的球体在原子形状的轨道上运行。
description.en_plain: Has damaging and slowing spheres that orbit in the shape of an atom symbol.
description.zh_plain: 能造成伤害和减速效果的球体在原子形状的轨道上运行。

description.en: Shoots dual projectiles forwards and backwards.
description.zh: 向前和向后发射双弹丸。
description.en_plain: Shoots dual projectiles forwards and backwards.
description.zh_plain: 向前和向后发射双弹丸。

description.en: Weaker version of the Sniper. Attacks from a long range.
description.zh: 狙击手的弱化版。从远距离攻击。
description.en_plain: Weaker version of the Sniper. Attacks from a long range.
description.zh_plain: 狙击手的弱化版。从远距离攻击。

description.en: Can't be moved. Can't level up. On play: Deal ! damage to all enemies. Double the damage that copies of this tower deal.
description.zh: 不能移动或提升等级。对所有敌人造成！伤害。使本塔的伤害翻倍。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Can't level up. On play: Deal ! damage to all enemies. Double the damage that copies of this tower deal.
description.zh_plain: 不能移动或提升等级。对所有敌人造成！伤害。使本塔的伤害翻倍。

description.en: Fires a low accuracy torrent of magic bullets. Gains almost perfect accuracy and piercing when placed on a Blind tile.
description.zh: 射击精度低。放置在 “盲 ”牌上时，精度和穿透力提高。
description.en_plain: Fires a low accuracy torrent of magic bullets. Gains almost perfect accuracy and piercing when placed on a Blind tile.
description.zh_plain: 射击精度低。放置在 “盲 ”牌上时，精度和穿透力提高。

description.en: Can't level up. Rebound. Teleports back all enemies in range a small distance.
description.zh: 无法提升等级。反弹。将范围内的所有敌人传送回一小段距离。
description.en_plain: Can't level up. Rebound. Teleports back all enemies in range a small distance.
description.zh_plain: 无法提升等级。反弹。将范围内的所有敌人传送回一小段距离。

description.en: Fires bombs that deal damage in an area.
description.zh: 发射炸弹，造成范围伤害。
description.en_plain: Fires bombs that deal damage in an area.
description.zh_plain: 发射炸弹，造成范围伤害。

description.en: Can target cloaked enemies. Stuns from a long distance.
description.zh: 可以攻击隐身敌人。远距离击晕敌人。
description.en_plain: Can target cloaked enemies. Stuns from a long distance.
description.zh_plain: 可以攻击隐身敌人。远距离击晕敌人。

description.en:
Wave start: This tower gains a secret random attribute that alters the game rules.
Dispel.
description.zh: 在每个波次开始时，此塔会获得一个秘密的随机属性，改变游戏规则。消耗。
description.en_plain:
Wave start: This tower gains a secret random attribute that alters the game rules.
Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 在每个波次开始时，此塔会获得一个秘密的随机属性，改变游戏规则。消耗。

description.en:
Towers in range gain magic penetration.
Red and Crimson Eye tiles give +3/10/30% fire rate and range.
description.zh: 范围内的塔楼获得魔法穿透。红色和绯红之眼牌提供 +3/10/30% 的射速和射程。
description.en_plain:
Towers in range gain magic penetration.
Red and Crimson Eye tiles give +3/10/30% fire rate and range.
description.zh_plain: 范围内的塔楼获得魔法穿透。红色和绯红之眼牌提供 +3/10/30% 的射速和射程。

description.en: Round start: Generate 2/7/25 crystals.
description.zh: 每回合开始生成2/7/25水晶。
description.en_plain: Round start: Generate 2/7/25 crystals.
description.zh_plain: 每回合开始生成2/7/25水晶。

description.en: Fires dual projectiles that pierce through armor.
description.zh: 发射可穿透装甲的双弹丸。
description.en_plain: Fires dual projectiles that pierce through armor.
description.zh_plain: 发射可穿透装甲的双弹丸。

description.en: Has double armor penetration when placed on Dark Matter tiles. Can be moved out of Dark Matter tiles.
description.zh: 放置在黑暗物质地砖上时具有双倍护甲穿透力。可移出黑暗物质地砖。
description.en_plain: Has double armor penetration when placed on Dark Matter tiles. Can be moved out of Dark Matter tiles.
description.zh_plain: 放置在黑暗物质地砖上时具有双倍护甲穿透力。可移出黑暗物质地砖。

description.en: Pierces enemies. Transcend: This tower ignores all enemy resistances.
description.zh: 它可以穿过敌人。超越：此塔无视所有抗性。
description.en_plain: Pierces enemies. Transcend: This tower ignores all enemy resistances.
description.zh_plain: 它可以穿过敌人。超越：此塔无视所有抗性。

description.en: Gains 5% range for each card in your hand, draw, discard and dispel piles combined.
description.zh: 为你手中和抽牌、弃牌、弃牌堆中的每张牌获得5%等级。
description.en_plain: Gains 5% range for each card in your hand, draw, discard and dispel piles combined.
description.zh_plain: 为你手中和抽牌、弃牌、弃牌堆中的每张牌获得5%等级。

description.en: Gains 5%/15%/50% attack speed for each card in your hand.
description.zh: 为你手中的每一张牌获得 5%/15%/50% 的攻击速度。
description.en_plain: Gains 5%/15%/50% attack speed for each card in your hand.
description.zh_plain: 为你手中的每一张牌获得 5%/15%/50% 的攻击速度。

description.en: Can't be moved. Can be placed on empty tiles. Slows enemies.
description.zh: 不能移动。可以放置在空位上。减缓敌人的速度。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Can be placed on empty tiles. Slows enemies.
description.zh_plain: 不能移动。可以放置在空位上。减缓敌人的速度。

description.en: Fires faster as long as it has targets available, up to triple fire rate over 10 seconds.
description.zh: 攻击范围内有敌人便可加快攻速，10秒后逐渐加快至三倍基础射速。
description.en_plain: Fires faster as long as it has targets available, up to triple fire rate over 10 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 攻击范围内有敌人便可加快攻速，10秒后逐渐加快至三倍基础射速。

description.en: Every third shot deals a percentage of the enemy's total health as true damage.
description.zh: 每隔三发射击都会额外造成敌人最大生命值百分比的真实伤害。
description.en_plain: Every third shot deals a percentage of the enemy's total health as true damage.
description.zh_plain: 每隔三发射击都会额外造成敌人最大生命值百分比的真实伤害。

description.en: Its fire rate, range and magic penetration increase as your health gets lower.
description.zh: 它的射速、射程和法术穿透随着你的当前生命值数值减少而增加。
description.en_plain: Its fire rate, range and magic penetration increase as your health gets lower.
description.zh_plain: 它的射速、射程和法术穿透随着你的当前生命值数值减少而增加。

description.en: Shoots inaccurate bullets that deal more damage the healthier enemies are.
description.zh: 射出制导不精确的弹药。敌人生命值百分比越高，造成伤害越高。
description.en_plain: Shoots inaccurate bullets that deal more damage the healthier enemies are.
description.zh_plain: 射出制导不精确的弹药。敌人生命值百分比越高，造成伤害越高。

description.en: Fires lasers that pierce through enemies penetrating their magic resistance.
description.zh: 发射具有法术穿透的激光，穿透敌人。
description.en_plain: Fires lasers that pierce through enemies penetrating their magic resistance.
description.zh_plain: 发射具有法术穿透的激光，穿透敌人。

description.en: Can't level up. Emits a deadly laser that can be rotated manually.
description.zh: 不能提升等级。发出致命的激光，可以手动旋转。
description.en_plain: Can't level up. Emits a deadly laser that can be rotated manually.
description.zh_plain: 不能提升等级。发出致命的激光，可以手动旋转。

description.en: When the enemies get hit by this tower and die within 2 seconds, there's a chance to restore 1 health.
description.zh: 若被其击中的敌人在2秒内死亡，有概率恢复1点生命值。
description.en_plain: When the enemies get hit by this tower and die within 2 seconds, there's a chance to restore 1 health.
description.zh_plain: 若被其击中的敌人在2秒内死亡，有概率恢复1点生命值。

description.en: When leveling up, gain 5 mana. Slightly slows nearby enemies.
description.zh: 当等级提高时，获得5点法力值。略微减缓附近敌人的速度。
description.en_plain: When leveling up, gain 5 mana. Slightly slows nearby enemies.
description.zh_plain: 当等级提高时，获得5点法力值。略微减缓附近敌人的速度。

description.en: Can't be moved. Can only be placed on path tiles. Slows enemies hit slightly.
description.zh: 无法移动。只能放置在路径瓷砖上。稍微减缓被击中敌人的速度。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Can only be placed on path tiles. Slows enemies hit slightly.
description.zh_plain: 无法移动。只能放置在路径瓷砖上。稍微减缓被击中敌人的速度。

description.en: Whenever this tower would get deactivated, prevent it and gain 7/15/40 crystals.
description.zh: 当此塔将被禁用时，阻止它并获得7/15/40水晶。
description.en_plain: Whenever this tower would get deactivated, prevent it and gain 7/15/40 crystals.
description.zh_plain: 当此塔将被禁用时，阻止它并获得7/15/40水晶。

description.en: Deals double damage to slowed or stunned enemies.
description.zh: 对被减速或眩晕的敌人造成双倍伤害。
description.en_plain: Deals double damage to slowed or stunned enemies.
description.zh_plain: 对被减速或眩晕的敌人造成双倍伤害。

description.en: Rebound.
description.zh: 反弹。
description.en_plain: Rebound.
description.zh_plain: 反弹。

description.en:
Rebound.
On Play: If you have 4 cards on hand or less, create a copy of this card in your hand.
description.zh: 反弹。出牌时：如果你的手牌数为 4 张或更少，则在你的手牌中复制一张这张牌。
description.en_plain:
Rebound.
On Play: If you have 4 cards on hand or less, create a copy of this card in your hand.
description.zh_plain: 反弹。出牌时：如果你的手牌数为 4 张或更少，则在你的手牌中复制一张这张牌。

description.en: Teleports back enemies, dealing magic damage based on enemy current health.
description.zh: 将敌人向出生点传送回去，根据敌人当前生命值造成魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: Teleports back enemies, dealing magic damage based on enemy current health.
description.zh_plain: 将敌人向出生点传送回去，根据敌人当前生命值造成魔法伤害。

description.en: On play: Gain 1 max spell mana. Round start: Gain 1/3/9 spell mana. Dispel.
description.zh: 放置此塔时，使你的最大法术法力值增加1。每回合开始时恢复1/3/9点法术法力值。消耗。
description.en_plain: On play: Gain 1 max spell mana. Round start: Gain 1/3/9 spell mana. Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 放置此塔时，使你的最大法术法力值增加1。每回合开始时恢复1/3/9点法术法力值。消耗。

description.en: Wave start: Spawn a sentry.
description.zh: 在每一波开始时召唤一个哨兵。
description.en_plain: Wave start: Spawn a sentry.
description.zh_plain: 在每一波开始时召唤一个哨兵。

description.en: Gains armor penetration equal to your shield multiplied by 5/15/45.
description.zh: 获得相当于你的护盾乘以5/15/45的护甲穿透力。
description.en_plain: Gains armor penetration equal to your shield multiplied by 5/15/45.
description.zh_plain: 获得相当于你的护盾乘以5/15/45的护甲穿透力。

description.en: Shoots multiple pellets that pierce through armor
description.zh: 射出可穿透护甲的多枚弹丸。
description.en_plain: Shoots multiple pellets that pierce through armor
description.zh_plain: 射出可穿透护甲的多枚弹丸。

description.en: Can be moved once during each wave. When moved, creates a shockwave that slows and deals damage.
description.zh: 在每一波中可以被重新放置一次。放置时额外在该处周围减速并伤害敌人。
description.en_plain: Can be moved once during each wave. When moved, creates a shockwave that slows and deals damage.
description.zh_plain: 在每一波中可以被重新放置一次。放置时额外在该处周围减速并伤害敌人。

description.en: Summons falling stars that stun and deal damage to nearby enemies.
description.zh: 召唤坠落的星星，使附近的敌人眩晕并造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Summons falling stars that stun and deal damage to nearby enemies.
description.zh_plain: 召唤坠落的星星，使附近的敌人眩晕并造成伤害。

description.en: Can't be deactivated. Can be rotated manually. Emits wide beams that pierce enemies, slowing them.
description.zh: 无法关闭。可手动旋转。发射大范围光束，穿透敌人，使其减速。
description.en_plain: Can't be deactivated. Can be rotated manually. Emits wide beams that pierce enemies, slowing them.
description.zh_plain: 无法关闭。可手动旋转。发射大范围光束，穿透敌人，使其减速。

description.en: Can't be deactivated. Can be rotated manually. Shoots constantly in the same direction.
description.zh: 无法关闭。可手动旋转。朝同一方向持续射击。
description.en_plain: Can't be deactivated. Can be rotated manually. Shoots constantly in the same direction.
description.zh_plain: 无法关闭。可手动旋转。朝同一方向持续射击。

description.en: Can't be moved. Can't level up. Can only be placed on path tiles. Teleports back an enemy, then disappears.
description.zh: 不能移动或提升等级。只能放置在路径方格中。将一个敌人传送回去并消失。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Can't level up. Can only be placed on path tiles. Teleports back an enemy, then disappears.
description.zh_plain: 不能移动或提升等级。只能放置在路径方格中。将一个敌人传送回去并消失。

description.en: Can't be moved. Round start: Create 3/10/30 yellow tiles on free spots of the map near this tower.
description.zh: 不能重新放置。在每一轮开始时，在这个塔附近的空位上创造3/10/30个黄色地格。
description.en_plain: Can't be moved. Round start: Create 3/10/30 yellow tiles on free spots of the map near this tower.
description.zh_plain: 不能重新放置。在每一轮开始时，在这个塔附近的空位上创造3/10/30个黄色地格。

description.en: Fires weak electric beams that propagate to nearby enemies and stun them.
description.zh: 发射弱电，扩散到附近的敌人并使他们眩晕。
description.en_plain: Fires weak electric beams that propagate to nearby enemies and stun them.
description.zh_plain: 发射弱电，扩散到附近的敌人并使他们眩晕。

description.en: Inflicts random effects on the enemies nearby. The strength of the effects scale with luck.
description.zh: 对附近的敌人造成随机效果。运气值越高效果强度越高。
description.en_plain: Inflicts random effects on the enemies nearby. The strength of the effects scale with luck.
description.zh_plain: 对附近的敌人造成随机效果。运气值越高效果强度越高。

description.en: Fires lasers in random directions that pierce through enemies, stunning them and dealing damage.
description.zh: 向随机方向发射激光，穿透敌人，使其眩晕并造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Fires lasers in random directions that pierce through enemies, stunning them and dealing damage.
description.zh_plain: 向随机方向发射激光，穿透敌人，使其眩晕并造成伤害。

description.en: Has orbiting spheres that stun, slow, or reduce enemy healing, depending on the sphere color.
description.zh: 拥有眩晕、减速或降低敌人治疗效果的球体。
description.en_plain: Has orbiting spheres that stun, slow, or reduce enemy healing, depending on the sphere color.
description.zh_plain: 拥有眩晕、减速或降低敌人治疗效果的球体。

description.en:
Rebound. Transcend: This card costs one less mana.
On Play: Draw 2 cards.
description.zh: 反弹。超越：此卡消耗的法力值减少 1。出牌时： 抽 2 张牌。
description.en_plain:
Rebound. Transcend: This card costs one less mana.
On Play: Draw 2 cards.
description.zh_plain: 反弹。超越：此卡消耗的法力值减少 1。出牌时： 抽 2 张牌。

description.en:
Always deals critical strikes to enemies without armor.
Removes 1/3/10 armor on impact.
description.zh: 始终对没有护甲的敌人造成致命一击。命中后可移除 1/3/10 护甲。
description.en_plain:
Always deals critical strikes to enemies without armor.
Removes 1/3/10 armor on impact.
description.zh_plain: 始终对没有护甲的敌人造成致命一击。命中后可移除 1/3/10 护甲。

description.en: Transcend: This card costs one less mana.
description.zh: 超越：这张牌花费的法力值减少一个。
description.en_plain: Transcend: This card costs one less mana.
description.zh_plain: 超越：这张牌花费的法力值减少一个。

description.en: Deals damage in an area. Gains 3/10/30 magic damage for each unique enchantment in play.
description.zh: 在区域内造成伤害。为游戏中的每个独特魔法获得 3/10/30 魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: Deals damage in an area. Gains 3/10/30 magic damage for each unique enchantment in play.
description.zh_plain: 在区域内造成伤害。为游戏中的每个独特魔法获得 3/10/30 魔法伤害。

description.en: Has triple the range and piercing when placed on an Clairvoyance tile.
description.zh: 放置在 “千里眼 ”牌上时，射程和穿透力增加三倍。
description.en_plain: Has triple the range and piercing when placed on an Clairvoyance tile.
description.zh_plain: 放置在 “千里眼 ”牌上时，射程和穿透力增加三倍。

description.en: Gains 10% fire rate for each tower with unique name on the battlefield.
description.zh: 战场上每座塔获得10%的攻击速度。
description.en_plain: Gains 10% fire rate for each tower with unique name on the battlefield.
description.zh_plain: 战场上每座塔获得10%的攻击速度。

description.en: Deals damage and stuns enemies if they are slowed. If not, slows them.
description.zh: 造成伤害并眩晕被减速的敌人。若敌人未被减速则使其减速。
description.en_plain: Deals damage and stuns enemies if they are slowed. If not, slows them.
description.zh_plain: 造成伤害并眩晕被减速的敌人。若敌人未被减速则使其减速。

description.en:
Can't be deactivated. Gains damage for each deactivated tower.
Wave Start: Deactivate 1/3/9 towers.
description.zh: 无法停用。每停用一座防御塔都会获得伤害。波动开始： 停用 1/3/9 个防御塔。
description.en_plain:
Can't be deactivated. Gains damage for each deactivated tower.
Wave Start: Deactivate 1/3/9 towers.
description.zh_plain: 无法停用。每停用一座防御塔都会获得伤害。波动开始： 停用 1/3/9 个防御塔。

description.en: Permanently reduces enemy speed, up to a maximum of 60% reduction.
description.zh: 永久性地降低敌人的速度，最多可降低60%。
description.en_plain: Permanently reduces enemy speed, up to a maximum of 60% reduction.
description.zh_plain: 永久性地降低敌人的速度，最多可降低60%。

description.en: Deals increasingly more damage when targeting the same enemy, up to quadruple damage over 6.5 seconds.
description.zh: 瞄准同一敌人时造成的伤害不断增加，持续6.5秒可达到最高四倍伤害。
description.en_plain: Deals increasingly more damage when targeting the same enemy, up to quadruple damage over 6.5 seconds.
description.zh_plain: 瞄准同一敌人时造成的伤害不断增加，持续6.5秒可达到最高四倍伤害。

description.en: Slows, reduces health regeneration and deals damage to all enemies in the battlefield at the same time.
description.zh: 减速，减少生命恢复，并同时对战场上所有敌人造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Slows, reduces health regeneration and deals damage to all enemies in the battlefield at the same time.
description.zh_plain: 减速，减少生命恢复，并同时对战场上所有敌人造成伤害。

description.en: Can't level up. Rebound. Gains 2% damage for each copy of this tower in play.
description.zh: 无法提升等级。反弹。每复制一个此塔在场上，就会获得 2% 的伤害。
description.en_plain: Can't level up. Rebound. Gains 2% damage for each copy of this tower in play.
description.zh_plain: 无法提升等级。反弹。每复制一个此塔在场上，就会获得 2% 的伤害。

description.en: Draw 1/3/9 more cards each round.
description.zh: 每回合多抽1/3/9张牌。
description.en_plain: Draw 1/3/9 more cards each round.
description.zh_plain: 每回合多抽1/3/9张牌。

description.en: Has rotating lasers that deal magic damage.
description.zh: 有旋转的激光，造成魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: Has rotating lasers that deal magic damage.
description.zh_plain: 有旋转的激光，造成魔法伤害。

description.en: Shoots projectiles in all directions.
description.zh: 向所有方向发射射弹。
description.en_plain: Shoots projectiles in all directions.
description.zh_plain: 向所有方向发射射弹。

description.en: When this tower levels up, it improves much more than other towers. Deals magic damage in an area.
description.zh: 每次升级该防御塔都会获得大幅强化。造成范围魔法伤害。
description.en_plain: When this tower levels up, it improves much more than other towers. Deals magic damage in an area.
description.zh_plain: 每次升级该防御塔都会获得大幅强化。造成范围魔法伤害。

description.en: Fires a giant laser that pierces through enemies, stunning them and dealing damage.
description.zh: 发射巨大的激光，穿透敌人，使其晕眩并造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Fires a giant laser that pierces through enemies, stunning them and dealing damage.
description.zh_plain: 发射巨大的激光，穿透敌人，使其晕眩并造成伤害。

description.en: Can target cloaked enemies. Attacks from a long range.
description.zh: 可以攻击隐身的敌人。从远距离攻击。
description.en_plain: Can target cloaked enemies. Attacks from a long range.
description.zh_plain: 可以攻击隐身的敌人。从远距离攻击。

description.en: Can only shoot once per wave, increasing with level. Teleports an enemy back to the start. Dispel.
description.zh: 每波只能射击一次，随等级增加。将一个敌人传送回出生点。消耗。
description.en_plain: Can only shoot once per wave, increasing with level. Teleports an enemy back to the start. Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 每波只能射击一次，随等级增加。将一个敌人传送回出生点。消耗。

description.en:
Pierces enemies.
On Play: If there is a level 3 copy of this tower in play, level up this tower to level 3.
description.zh: 穿透敌人。发动时：如果场上有该塔的 3 级副本，则升至 3 级。
description.en_plain:
Pierces enemies.
On Play: If there is a level 3 copy of this tower in play, level up this tower to level 3.
description.zh_plain: 穿透敌人。发动时：如果场上有该塔的 3 级副本，则升至 3 级。

description.en: Deals 8% more damage for each card in the dispel pile.
description.zh: 对弃牌堆中的每张牌造成8%的额外伤害。
description.en_plain: Deals 8% more damage for each card in the dispel pile.
description.zh_plain: 对弃牌堆中的每张牌造成8%的额外伤害。

description.en: Casts copies of the last spell cast. Slows down when copying the same spells and when copying expensive spells.
description.zh: 重复释放最后一次施放的法术。在多次复制相同法术和复制高费法术时速度减慢。
description.en_plain: Casts copies of the last spell cast. Slows down when copying the same spells and when copying expensive spells.
description.zh_plain: 重复释放最后一次施放的法术。在多次复制相同法术和复制高费法术时速度减慢。

description.en: Fires black holes that deal damage and teleport back enemies.
description.zh: 发射黑洞，造成伤害并将敌人向出生点传送一段距离。
description.en_plain: Fires black holes that deal damage and teleport back enemies.
description.zh_plain: 发射黑洞，造成伤害并将敌人向出生点传送一段距离。

description.en: Reduces the level of the enemy in range with the highest level. If it's level 1, it receives a slow.
description.zh: 降低范围内最高等级敌人的等级。如果是 1 级，则会受到减速效果。
description.en_plain: Reduces the level of the enemy in range with the highest level. If it's level 1, it receives a slow.
description.zh_plain: 降低范围内最高等级敌人的等级。如果是 1 级，则会受到减速效果。

description.en: Fires 9 projectiles in a cone shape that pierce enemies and decay after a short distance. Reduces enemy regeneration.
description.zh: 呈锥形地发射9枚弹丸，刺穿敌人后距离大幅衰减。减少敌人的生命恢复能力。
description.en_plain: Fires 9 projectiles in a cone shape that pierce enemies and decay after a short distance. Reduces enemy regeneration.
description.zh_plain: 呈锥形地发射9枚弹丸，刺穿敌人后距离大幅衰减。减少敌人的生命恢复能力。

description.en: Round start: Gain 1/3/9 mana. Dispel.
description.zh: 每回合开始时获得1/3/9法力值。消耗。
description.en_plain: Round start: Gain 1/3/9 mana. Dispel.
description.zh_plain: 每回合开始时获得1/3/9法力值。消耗。

description.en:
Pierces and reduces regeneration.
On Play: Convert the tile this tower is on into a Crimson Eye tile.
description.zh: 穿透并减少再生。发动时： 将此塔所在的地砖转换为深红之眼地砖。
description.en_plain:
Pierces and reduces regeneration.
On Play: Convert the tile this tower is on into a Crimson Eye tile.
description.zh_plain: 穿透并减少再生。发动时： 将此塔所在的地砖转换为深红之眼地砖。

description.en: Inflicts more damage for each shot this tower type fired this combat.
description.zh: 本场战斗中，该类型的防御塔每发射一枪都会造成更大的伤害。
description.en_plain: Inflicts more damage for each shot this tower type fired this combat.
description.zh_plain: 本场战斗中，该类型的防御塔每发射一枪都会造成更大的伤害。

description.en: Shoots inaccurate lightnings that stun enemies briefly.
description.zh: 发射不准确的闪电，短暂眩晕敌人。
description.en_plain: Shoots inaccurate lightnings that stun enemies briefly.
description.zh_plain: 发射不准确的闪电，短暂眩晕敌人。

description.en: Casts copies of the Thunder spell on nearby enemies.
description.zh: 向附近的敌人施放雷电法术的副本。
description.en_plain: Casts copies of the Thunder spell on nearby enemies.
description.zh_plain: 向附近的敌人施放雷电法术的副本。

description.en:
Can't level up. Restore 1 health each wave.
On play: Reduce the amount of waves in this combat by 1.
description.zh: 无法提升等级。每波恢复1点生命。当放置时，减少1个波数。
description.en_plain:
Can't level up. Restore 1 health each wave.
On play: Reduce the amount of waves in this combat by 1.
description.zh_plain: 无法提升等级。每波恢复1点生命。当放置时，减少1个波数。

description.en: Always deals critical strikes.
description.zh: 总是能造成关键打击。
description.en_plain: Always deals critical strikes.
description.zh_plain: 总是能造成关键打击。

description.en: Fires electric beams that propagate to nearby enemies and stun them.
description.zh: 发射电流传导至到附近的敌人并使他们眩晕。
description.en_plain: Fires electric beams that propagate to nearby enemies and stun them.
description.zh_plain: 发射电流传导至到附近的敌人并使他们眩晕。

description.en:
Gains 10% fire rate for each damage received this combat.
Martyr.
description.zh: 在战斗中每受到一次伤害，都会获得 10%的射速。殉道者
description.en_plain:
Gains 10% fire rate for each damage received this combat.
Martyr.
description.zh_plain: 在战斗中每受到一次伤害，都会获得 10%的射速。殉道者

description.en: Fires slow-moving orbs that deal damage to nearby enemies.
description.zh: 发射缓慢移动的球体，对附近的敌人造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Fires slow-moving orbs that deal damage to nearby enemies.
description.zh_plain: 发射缓慢移动的球体，对附近的敌人造成伤害。

description.en: Deals a very high amount of damage at a high cost. Stuns enemies.
description.zh: 以高代价造成非常高的伤害。眩晕敌人。
description.en_plain: Deals a very high amount of damage at a high cost. Stuns enemies.
description.zh_plain: 以高代价造成非常高的伤害。眩晕敌人。

description.en:
Round start: Gain 1/3/10 shield.
Stuns enemies for 0.1/0.3/1s times your shield amount.
description.zh: 每回合获得1/3/10的护盾。晕眩时间为0.1/0.3/1s，乘以你的护盾。
description.en_plain:
Round start: Gain 1/3/10 shield.
Stuns enemies for 0.1/0.3/1s times your shield amount.
description.zh_plain: 每回合获得1/3/10的护盾。晕眩时间为0.1/0.3/1s，乘以你的护盾。

description.en: Emits wide light beams that pierce enemies, dealing magic damage and slowing.
description.zh: 发射大范围光束，穿透敌人，造成魔法伤害并减速。
description.en_plain: Emits wide light beams that pierce enemies, dealing magic damage and slowing.
description.zh_plain: 发射大范围光束，穿透敌人，造成魔法伤害并减速。

description.en: Fires bombs that deal damage in a huge area.
description.zh: 发射炸弹，对大片区域造成伤害。
description.en_plain: Fires bombs that deal damage in a huge area.
description.zh_plain: 发射炸弹，对大片区域造成伤害。

description.en: On play: Restore 1 health. Martyr.
description.zh: 当放置时，恢复1个生命值。殉道者。
description.en_plain: On play: Restore 1 health. Martyr.
description.zh_plain: 当放置时，恢复1个生命值。殉道者。

description.en:
Costs 1 less mana for every other card in your hand.
Shoots a laser that pierces.
description.zh: 手牌中每有一张其他牌，消耗的法力值就会减少 1。
description.en_plain:
Costs 1 less mana for every other card in your hand.
Shoots a laser that pierces.
description.zh_plain: 手牌中每有一张其他牌，消耗的法力值就会减少 1。

description.en: Costs 1 less mana for each card in your hand, draw, discard and dispel piles combined.
description.zh: 你的手牌以及你的抽牌、弃牌和弃牌堆中的每张牌都少耗费1点法力。
description.en_plain: Costs 1 less mana for each card in your hand, draw, discard and dispel piles combined.
description.zh_plain: 你的手牌以及你的抽牌、弃牌和弃牌堆中的每张牌都少耗费1点法力。
